Calculation.Text: Let ( [ context = Case ( IO Context = "Member"; "👤"; IO Context = "Group"; "👥"; IO Context = "Session"; "🧑‍🧑‍🧒‍🧒"; IO Context = "Title"; "🧿" ; "▶️" ) /* io_type = Case ( FAT IO @ Text variable::IO type = "Rate"; "📊"; FAT IO @ Text variable::IO type = "Select"; "☑️"; FAT IO @ Text variable::IO type = "Post"; "💬" )*/ ]; context & " " & Name )
